pr.title: [Non-record] Scaled Byte-level H-Net matches 4-hour subword-level baseline (H-Net val_bpb = 1.2070)

output.summary: Scaled byte260 H-Net (12L OL3) applies INT6 GPTQ/QAT with torch.compile-friendly chunking and sliding-window eval to match the 4h subword baseline.
techniques: Scaled 12L H-Net byte260 with OL3 encoder/main/decoder
INT6 GPTQ + QAT for compact quantized weights
Fixed chunk cap for torch.compile plus stride-64 sliding eval
